MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $845.58 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT VEGA, BLANCA ARACELY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VEGA, BLANCA ARACELY $845.58 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $930.58 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
